title: woodsia asiatica
intro: Woodsia asiatica, also known as the Asian cliff fern, is a species of fern native to China, Japan, and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsia asiatica include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Woodsia asiatica can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its dried fronds, or by incorporating the plant into a tincture or ointment, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
